scripts.query:positions: sqlite3 database/jiujitsu-bench.sqlite "SELECT id, name, type, family, context FROM terms WHERE type IN ('major_position', 'variation', 'transition_position', 'passing_position') ORDER BY family, name;"
scripts.query:submissions: sqlite3 database/jiujitsu-bench.sqlite "SELECT position_name, submission_name FROM position_submissions ORDER BY position_name, submission_name;"
